criteria.description: Confirmed diagnosis of moderate-to-severe rheumatoid arthritis, psoriatic arthritis, or ankylosing spondylitis by a rheumatologist or specialist
Trial and documented failure of at least 2 conventional DMARDs (e.g., methotrexate, hydroxychloroquine, sulfasalazine, leflunomide) for a minimum of 3 months each at adequate dosing
Current disease activity score indicating moderate-to-severe disease: DAS28 > 3.2, CDAI > 10, or SDAI > 11
No active tuberculosis or untreated latent TB (negative TB screening required within last 12 months)
Prescriber is a board-certified rheumatologist or has documented rheumatology consultation

documentation_required: Rheumatologist clinical notes confirming diagnosis
Records of prior DMARD trials with dates and dosages
Recent disease activity score or equivalent clinical assessment
TB screening results (QuantiFERON or PPD within 12 months)

criteria.description: Confirmed diagnosis of moderate-to-severe asthma with eosinophilic phenotype or oral corticosteroid-dependent asthma
Inadequate control on inhaled corticosteroid (ICS) plus at least one additional controller medication (LABA, LAMA, or leukotriene modifier) at maximum tolerated doses for at least 3 months
Blood eosinophil count >= 300 cells/mcL OR fractional exhaled nitric oxide (FeNO) >= 25 ppb within the past 12 months
At least 2 asthma exacerbations requiring systemic corticosteroids in the past 12 months, OR currently dependent on oral corticosteroids

documentation_required: Pulmonologist or allergist clinical notes
Records of current and prior controller medications with dosages
Recent CBC with differential showing eosinophil count
Spirometry results from past 12 months

insulin_pump.drug_class: Insulin delivery device (continuous subcutaneous insulin infusion)

criteria.description: Confirmed diagnosis of Type 1 or insulin-dependent Type 2 diabetes mellitus
HbA1c >= 8.0% despite intensive conventional insulin therapy (multiple daily injections) for at least 6 months
Documentation of at least 4 self-monitored blood glucose readings per day for the past 30 days
Completed diabetes education program (DSMES) or equivalent documented training
Patient demonstrates willingness and ability to use continuous glucose monitoring (CGM) in conjunction with pump therapy

documentation_required: Endocrinologist or primary care notes confirming diabetes type and duration
HbA1c results from past 3 months
Blood glucose log or CGM data for past 30 days
Certificate of diabetes education completion
Letter of medical necessity from prescribing physician

criteria.description: Confirmed diagnosis of Major Depressive Disorder (MDD) or Treatment-Resistant Depression (TRD), defined as failure of at least 4 adequate antidepressant trials
Failed trials of at least 4 different antidepressants from at least 2 different drug classes, each at therapeutic dose for minimum 8 weeks
Current active suicidal ideation OR PHQ-9 score >= 15 (moderate-severe depression)
Psychiatrist referral and recommendation for ketamine therapy
No history of psychosis, schizophrenia, or active substance use disorder

documentation_required: Psychiatrist clinical notes with TRD diagnosis
Complete medication history showing failed antidepressant trials with dates and doses
Current PHQ-9 or equivalent depression scale score
Letter of medical necessity from psychiatrist
Substance use screening results

criteria.description: Confirmed diagnosis of ADHD (Attention-Deficit/Hyperactivity Disorder) by a licensed psychiatrist or neurologist using DSM-5 criteria
Trial and inadequate response to at least one non-stimulant ADHD medication (atomoxetine, guanfacine ER, or clonidine ER) for minimum 8 weeks at therapeutic dose
Documented functional impairment in at least 2 life domains (work/school, social, family) as evidenced by standardized rating scale (CAARS, ASRS, or equivalent)
No current untreated cardiovascular conditions including uncontrolled hypertension, structural heart defects, or history of sudden cardiac death in family
Specialist (psychiatrist or neurologist) must be the prescribing physician or co-managing the case

documentation_required: Psychiatrist or neurologist evaluation confirming DSM-5 ADHD diagnosis
Standardized ADHD rating scale scores (CAARS, ASRS, or Conners)
Records of prior non-stimulant medication trials
Recent cardiovascular assessment or EKG if indicated
Functional impairment documentation from employer, school, or therapist
